blocks.content: He meant it. That was the thing about Jonathan — he could be a lot and he could push too hard and he could miss things — but when he was in it with you, he was actually in it.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: It's not fine. Don't say it's fine.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: Then I don't know what else to say about it.
The bell went. Kids filed past. We both stood at the empty locker for a second longer than we needed to.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: You good to get through today?

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: The game's tonight. You don't have to come if —
We went to class. The day moved the way days move when you're carrying something — slower in the moments, faster everywhere else.
